name: Tables & charts
desc: Financial tables, a bar chart, a pie chart and a pricing grid. The answers live in visual structure, not plain text.

rows.parse:
# Helio Systems - Quarterly revenue by region

Fiscal year 2025, USD millions

| **Region** | **Q1** | **Q2** | **Q3** | **Q4** | **FY25** |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| North America | 48.2 | 51.6 | 55.1 | 61.3 | 216.2 |
| EMEA | 31.4 | 30.9 | 33.8 | 36.2 | 132.3 |
| Asia Pacific | 22.7 | 24.5 | 27.9 | 30.4 | 105.5 |
| Latin America | 9.1 | 9.8 | 10.6 | 11.2 | 40.7 |
| Total | 111.4 | 116.8 | 127.4 | 139.1 | 494.7 |

Note: Q4 includes the Meridian contract renewal in North America.

Prepared by Finance Operations, January 2026.

rows.parse:
# Operating expense breakdown

Crestway Logistics - fiscal 2025

| **Category** | **FY25 spend** | **Share of total** |  |
|---|---|---|---|
| Fleet fuel \ | maintenance | $412,000 | 17.2% |
| Salaries \ | benefits | $1,240,000 | 51.7% |
| Warehouse leases | $386,000 | 16.1% |  |
| Insurance | $154,000 | 6.4% |  |
| IT \ | software | $121,000 | 5.0% |
| Marketing | $87,000 | 3.6% |  |
| Total operating expense | $2,400,000 | 100.0% |  |

Salaries & benefits remain the largest category for the third year running. Fuel spend fell 6% year over year on route optimization.

## Stackline platform pricing

Billed monthly, per workspace

|  | **Basic** | **Team** | **Business** | **Enterprise** |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Price per month | $0 | $29 | $79 | $249 |
| Included seats | 3 | 10 | 25 | Unlimited |
| Storage | 5 GB | 200 GB | 2 TB | 10 TB |
| Audit log | - | - | Yes | Yes |
| Support | Community | Email | Priority | Dedicated |

Annual billing saves 20% on every paid plan.

All plans include unlimited viewers and two-factor sign-in.
